name: lumina-studio
description: Professional reel and short-form video composer powered by FFmpeg
author: Lumina Studio

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.electron:pack: vite build && cross-env npm_config_platform=darwin npm_config_arch=x64 node node_modules/ffmpeg-static/install.js && cross-env npm_config_platform=darwin npm_config_arch=arm64 node node_modules/ffmpeg-static/install.js && electron-builder build --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: vite build && cross-env npm_config_platform=win32 npm_config_arch=x64 node node_modules/ffmpeg-static/install.js && electron-builder build --win --x64
